info.name: Jalan Spesifikasi Desain Kaku
info.description: API collection for Jalan Spesifikasi Desain Kaku (Rigid Pavement Design Specification) module - Master data for rigid/concrete pavement design specifications

item.name: Query Endpoints
Get All Spesifikasi Desain Kaku (with pagination)

request.description:
Get all jalan spesifikasi desain kaku with optional pagination.

**Roles**: OPD, VERIFIKATOR, ADMIN, SUPERADMIN

**Response**:
```json
{
  "data": [
    {
      "id": 1,
      "spec": "Bagan Desain 1",
      "desc": "Perkerasan beton dengan lalu lintas rendah",
      "createdAt": "...",
      "updatedAt": "..."
    }
  ],
  "page": 1,
  "amount": 10,
  "total": 5,
  "totalPages": 1
}
```

item.name: Get All Spesifikasi Desain Kaku (without pagination)

request.description:
Get all jalan spesifikasi desain kaku without pagination (returns all records).

**Roles**: OPD, VERIFIKATOR, ADMIN, SUPERADMIN

Get single jalan spesifikasi desain kaku detail by ID.

**Roles**: OPD, VERIFIKATOR, ADMIN, SUPERADMIN

**Response**:
```json
{
  "id": 1,
  "spec": "Bagan Desain 1",
  "desc": "Perkerasan beton dengan lalu lintas rendah",
  "createdAt": "...",
  "updatedAt": "..."
}
```

item.description: Read-only endpoints accessible by all roles

item.name: CRUD Endpoints (SUPERADMIN Only)

request.description:
Create new jalan spesifikasi desain kaku.

**Role**: SUPERADMIN only

**Body**:
```json
{
  "spec": "string",  // Required - Specification code/name
  "desc": "string"   // Required - Description
}
```

**Common Rigid Pavement Design Specifications**:

**Bagan Desain 1-5** (Based on Indonesian Road Standards):

| Spec | Description | Traffic Load |
|------|-------------|-------------|
| Bagan Desain 1 | Perkerasan beton bersambung tanpa tulangan | Low |
| Bagan Desain 2 | Perkerasan beton bersambung dengan tulangan | Medium |
| Bagan Desain 3 | Perkerasan beton menerus dengan tulangan | Medium-High |
| Bagan Desain 4 | Perkerasan beton prategang | High |
| Bagan Desain 5 | Perkerasan beton komposit | Very High |

**Response**:
```json
{
  "status": "success",
  "responseCode": 201,
  "message": "Jalan Spesifikasi Desain Kaku created",
  "data": {
    "id": 1,
    "spec": "Bagan Desain 1",
    "desc": "Perkerasan Beton Bersambung Tanpa Tulangan dengan Lalu Lintas Rendah",
    "createdAt": "...",
    "updatedAt": "..."
  }
}
```

Create reinforced jointed concrete pavement specification.

**Role**: SUPERADMIN only

Create continuously reinforced concrete pavement (CRCP) specification.

**Role**: SUPERADMIN only

Create prestressed concrete pavement specification.

**Role**: SUPERADMIN only

Update existing jalan spesifikasi desain kaku.

**Role**: SUPERADMIN only

**Body**:
```json
{
  "id": number,      // Required - ID to update
  "spec": string,    // Optional - New spec name
  "desc": string     // Optional - New description
}
```

**Response**:
```json
{
  "status": "success",
  "responseCode": 200,
  "message": "Jalan Spesifikasi Desain Kaku updated",
  "data": {
    "id": 1,
    "spec": "Bagan Desain 1 (Updated)",
    "desc": "Updated description",
    "createdAt": "...",
    "updatedAt": "..."
  }
}
```

Soft delete jalan spesifikasi desain kaku.

**Role**: SUPERADMIN only

**Body**:
```json
{
  "id": number  // Required - ID to delete
}
```

**Response**:
```json
{
  "status": "success",
  "responseCode": 200,
  "message": "Jalan Spesifikasi Desain Kaku deleted",
  "data": true
}
```

**Note**: This is a soft delete. The record will be marked as deleted but not removed from database.

item.description: Create, Update, Delete operations - Only accessible by SUPERADMIN
